// Our Team

The People Behind
Travex Digital Group

A passionate team of young Tanzanian innovators — united by one mission: to build technology that transforms lives across Africa.

Lucas Deus
Marketing & Vision Leader
Lucas drives the strategic marketing vision of Travex Digital Group. With a deep understanding of African markets and consumer behaviour, he shapes how Travex brands connect with businesses and communities across Tanzania.
Marketing Strategy Brand Vision Market Research
Founder & CEO
Jumanne Maregeri
Founder & CEO
The visionary behind Travex Digital Group. At 23, Jumanne founded the company with a bold mission: use technology to solve Tanzania's real challenges. He leads product strategy, business development and the group's overall direction.
Entrepreneurship Product Strategy Innovation Leadership
Hamza At Human
Marketing & Operations Leader
Hamza is the engine of Travex's digital presence and operational excellence. A social media expert, he manages day-to-day operations while driving engagement strategies that connect Travex platforms with Tanzania's digital community.
Social Media Content Creation Operations
// Our Culture

How We Work Together

🔥
Move Fast, Build Right
We move with urgency but never compromise quality. Every feature we ship solves a real problem for real users.
🤝
Community First
Every decision starts with one question: "Does this help the businesses and people we serve?" Always.
🌍
African Pride
We are proudly Tanzanian and proudly African. We build technology that reflects our values, culture and limitless potential.
💡
Always Learning
Technology evolves. So do we. We constantly learn, iterate and improve — because the communities we serve deserve our best.

Want to Join Our Team?

We're always looking for passionate Tanzanians who want to build Africa's digital future with us.
